Contact Profile: <From Bulldog> Parshall hosts "Janet Parshall's America!" a nationally syndicated show on 258 stations as well as XM radio. "We cover everything, from politics to lifestyle, sports to family issues," she says, and is "open to everything." Send her a press release, press kit, product sample or background info. She looks for "ideas, communication and entertainment" in a guest. Reach her between 10 a.m. and 2 p.m. Eastern Standard Time. "Please don't ask for a return call if we choose not to book a guest," she says. Contact her by fax whenever possible. Reach her producer with story ideas via fax or email at bernie@jpamerica.com.

Contact Profile: <From Bulldog> (pron. "gear-jus") "The Mimi Geerges Show" is an independently produced talk-radio program on XM Radio. Guests on the program are primarily book authors and topics are wide-ranging. Geerges does not steer away from controversial issues, like modern Islam. "I interview mostly authors of new books: non-fiction, memoirs, biographies and public affairs. No 'how to' books,"  she explains. "I wish PR people would check my website [www.mgshow.org] and see what kind of shows I typically do," she says. Contact by email only.
